description: Replace doLoopback() in internal/cli/rc/rc.go with u-root's libinit.NetInit() which uses netlink to bring up the loopback interface. Since kernel 6.8+ handles loopback address/route configuration automatically, the old code that manually added 127.0.0.1/8 and routes via /sbin/ip is no longer needed. Use TDD approach: write tests first, then implement.
steps: First, write a spec/plan document at docs/plans/replace-network-init-with-uroot-netinit.md explaining the change, the rationale (kernel 6.8+ handles loopback automatically), and the approach (use u-root libinit.NetInit which uses netlink)

In internal/cli/rc/rc_test.go, add a test that verifies the doLoopback function no longer exists or is replaced. Since the rc package calls Run() which calls doLoopback(), add a test verifying the Run function's sequence no longer includes manual ip commands. Note: the existing tests only test the namespace slice - they don't test Run() directly because it requires root.

Replace the doLoopback() function body in internal/cli/rc/rc.go. Remove the exec.Command calls to /sbin/ip. Replace with a call to github.com/u-root/u-root/pkg/libinit.NetInit(). Add the import for libinit.
Remove the now-unnecessary 'os/exec' import if it is no longer used by other functions in rc.go (check: doHotplug still uses exec.Command, doClock still uses exec.Command, so exec import stays)
Run 'go mod tidy' to ensure vishvananda/netlink (transitive dependency of u-root/libinit) is properly tracked in go.sum
Run golangci-lint to format and lint the changed files

Commit with message: 'feat(rc): replace doLoopback with u-root libinit.NetInit

Replace shell-out to /sbin/ip with u-root libinit.NetInit() which uses
netlink to bring up the loopback interface. On kernel 6.8+, the kernel
automatically configures the loopback address (127.0.0.1/8) and route
when the interface is brought up, making the manual address/route
commands unnecessary.

This eliminates a dependency on /sbin/ip being available in the initramfs
and uses the proper kernel netlink API instead of shelling out.'
acceptance_criteria: doLoopback() function body calls libinit.NetInit() instead of exec.Command('/sbin/ip', ...)
No references to '127.0.0.1' or 'ip addr add' remain in internal/cli/rc/rc.go
The import 'github.com/u-root/u-root/pkg/libinit' is present in rc.go
